pr-evidence/require-admin-branch-protect.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found that release_bundle.py still accepted enforce_admins=false sidecars; the branch was fixed with bundle validation and regression coverage, then GPT-5.5 approved with no findings.
what_changed: Required GitHub branch protection to apply to administrators for release readiness.
Hardened release-bundle validation to reject governance sidecars with branch_protection.enforce_admins false or missing.
pr-evidence/require-admin-branch-protect.why: Direct pushes to main are prohibited; release governance and strict bundles must reject admin branch-protection bypass.
